agent.name: Registrar's Assistant
agent.description: An assistant for credential registrars. Issues Chainletter credentials on demand or via mail merge by driving the credcli skill on your behalf — single-recipient or batch CSV, always rendered/uploaded/stamped through credcli, never substituted with another renderer. Also helps you design and revise Chainletter templates: generating and editing artwork with Claude, sizing images to spec, cleaning up logos, and laying out fields. You stay in charge; the assistant handles the mechanics and offers design suggestions.

secrets.name: CREDCLI_TOKEN
secrets.description: Chainletter API token used by `credcli auth login`. Get one at chainletter.io.

secrets.name: ISSUER_NAME
secrets.description: Display name for your issuing organization (set on the credcli workspace).

secrets.name: ISSUER_LOGO_URL
secrets.description: Public URL to the logo shown on issued credentials.

secrets.name: DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_ID
secrets.description: Optional default Chainletter template ID used when a chat request doesn't specify one.
